title.en: Before she could think about it, the swamp bega...

content.en:
"Big guy?"

The Qinghan Fairy was stunned, realizing that the big guy Ye Tian said should be a more powerful true god-level creature.

Before she could think about it, the swamp began to shake.

A poisonous dragon full of toxins emerged from the swamp, staring at the Qinghan Fairy and the others with a pair of huge green eyes.

Its aura is very powerful, it is definitely the realm of the peak of the true god level, and its aura far exceeds the peak of the ordinary true god level.

"There's a dragon here!"

The Qinghan Fairy was a little surprised, but when she thought that many places in the Terran region had also given birth to dragon clans in the past, she didn't care.

The blood of the dragon clan is sprinkled all over the universe, and many places can give birth to the dragon clan, but these dragon clans have not been to the territory of the dragon clan, and can only be regarded as wild dragon clans.

And at the moment, this poisonous dragon is a wild dragon, but its strength is not weaker than that of the real dragon, and even among the dragons, it can be regarded as a top true god-level dragon.

"You guys go up together and subdue this poisonous dragon!"

The Qinghan Fairy commanded.

"Yes!"

The god-level guards responded and immediately launched a siege on this poisonous dragon.

But as soon as they fought, the expressions of the god-level guards changed, and they saw that this poisonous dragon released endless toxins, forming a poisonous domain, and the toxins were very terrifying, making the state of the god-level guards continue to decrease.

"This poisonous dragon has a toxin-level god-level talent, and its combat effectiveness is very terrifying, fortunately, it is not from the territory of the dragon clan, it should not be a dragon clan's divine power, otherwise once it learns the poisonous divine power, these god-level escorts of yours will definitely die in front of each other!"

Ye Tian commented.

Qinghan Fairy's face was a little nervous, if she continued like this, her escorts would probably die.

"Frozen Gates!"

The Qinghan Fairy chose to make a move, and it was a magical power when he came up.

Rumble!!!

The huge frozen gate descended and landed in front of the poisonous dragon, and endless cold erupted, instantly sealing the poisonous dragon.

But before the Qinghan Fairy could smile, the ice shattered, and the poisonous dragon roared, and the momentum was even better.

At this moment, a huge poisonous dragon tail swept over, directly knocking away several god-level guards, heading towards the Qinghan Fairy.

At this moment, the Qinghan Fairy sensed the aura of danger and tried to dodge, but the speed could not keep up.

Originally, she was also considered to be superior in combat power at the god-level level, but after all, the cultivation of this poisonous dragon was the peak of the true god-level, and she had god-level talent, not ordinary power.

Such a poisonous dragon, only the god level of the child of the universe can suppress it, and the Qinghan fairy is not the son of the universe, and neither are those guards, even if they are united, they are far inferior to a son of the universe, so they naturally cannot suppress this poisonous dragon.

Just when the Qinghan Fairy thought that he was going to be injured, a hand suddenly stopped the poisonous dragon's tail, and immediately conjured up a big hand, grabbed the poisonous dragon's tail and pulled it fiercely, directly throwing the poisonous dragon away.

"Are you alright?"

Ye Tian looked at the Qinghan Fairy.

"I didn't ...... thing!"

The Qinghan Fairy paused.

"The most powerful thing about this poisonous dragon is the god-level toxin talent, as long as you suppress the opponent's toxin, you can defeat the opponent. You are the disciples of Danta, don't you even have the treasure to suppress the toxin talent?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Yes!"

Qinghan Fairy hurriedly said.

Immediately, the Qinghan Fairy took a pill, and the other god-level guards also took a pill.

Then, the Qinghan Fairy took out a superb artifact, similar to an artifact like a scepter, and released an infinite blue light, directly enveloping the true god-level poisonous dragon.

Under the suppression of this artifact, the poison dragon's toxin talent was suppressed.

Soon.

This poisonous dragon is in a weak state, but the cultivation of the poisonous dragon is too strong, and the Qinghan Fairy and the others can only suppress the other party, but it is a little difficult to kill the other party.

"Your Highness Wanfa, aren't you going to help?"

The fairy power of the Qinghan fairy was a little insufficient, so he called.

If there was a true god-level among her or the guards, it wouldn't be too difficult to kill this poisonous dragon, but unfortunately, it was only a god-level cultivation, and there was too much difference between it and the peak of the true god-level.

In such a continuous battle, the immortal power consumption of Qinghan Fairy and others is too serious, if they continue to fight, the divine power of the poisonous dragon has not been exhausted, and the immortal power of Qinghan Fairy and others will have to be exhausted.

Therefore, the Qinghan Fairy asked Ye Tian for help.

"Let me help, what about listening to me next? By the way, there are dozens of true god-level creatures in the surrounding area, and there are a few of them that are not weaker than this poisonous dragon!"

Ye Tian said.

"What!"

Qinghan Fairy's face changed.

If that's the case, that's not good.

With so many true god-level creatures pouring in, they absolutely couldn't bear it.

"Okay, I promise you!"

The Qinghan Fairy agreed.

"Okay, get out of the way!"

Ye Tian said.

Woohoo!!

Fairy Qinghan and the others dodged in an instant and came behind Ye Tian.

The poisonous dragon glanced at Ye Tian with fear, a little hesitant, the scene when Ye Tian threw it away all at once before, it still remembers.

Although Ye Tian didn't hurt it, it didn't know what Ye Tian's strength was, so it hesitated whether to attack Ye Tian.

But soon, it rushed over.

"Test my Hell's Sky Spear!"

Ye Tian suddenly thought.

Although he had tried the power of the Hell's Divine Sky Spear in the cultivation tower, he had never used it on a real creature.

"Hell Divine Spear, go!"

A spear pierced abruptly and hit the poisonous dragon in an instant.

Then, the poisonous dragon let out a terrible scream, and its entire body turned to ashes.

One move to kill!

This scene was seen by the Qinghan Fairy, and her eyes suddenly widened.

"The poisonous dragon is dead?"

The Qinghan Fairy couldn't believe it.

She and more than a dozen guards besieged this poisonous dragon together, but they couldn't defeat the poisonous dragon, and Ye Tian killed the poisonous dragon in one move in seconds.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

At this moment, a powerful true god-level creature appeared.

"Sure enough, there are a lot of true god-level creatures here, he didn't lie to us!"

The Qinghan Fairy muttered.

If Ye Tian hadn't made a move just now, she and the guards would have been absolutely dangerous.

Qing Han sensed it, there were a total of seventeen true god-level creatures, and three of them had a breath comparable to the poisonous dragon just now.

"The Stygian Flower Realm is really dangerous, no wonder my father won't let me in, if there is no His Highness Wanfa, I will definitely be in danger this time!"

The Qinghan Fairy thought.

In the blink of an eye, those true god-level creatures came.

"Space Confinement!"

Ye Tian's spatial power was imprisoned all around, and how terrifying the spatial means used with Ye Tian's strength were terrifying, although these true god-level creatures were not completely imprisoned, their speed was slow to the limit.

At this time, Ye Tian continued to teleport and coupled with the Heavenly Moon Knife, he killed a true god-level creature in one sword.

Whew!!

Under a dozen teleportations, more than a dozen true god-level creatures all died.

In the eyes of the Qinghan Fairy, it seemed that just a moment had passed, and the dozen or so true god-level creatures had all turned into corpses and fell into the swamp.
